errors.userNotFound: This user no longer exists. The list will refresh.

errors.rideAlreadyCancelled: This ride has already been cancelled.
errors.reviewNotFound: This review no longer exists. The list will refresh.
errors.reportNotFound: This report no longer exists. The list will refresh.
errors.reportReasonRequired: A reason is required when resolving or dismissing a report.
errors.reportInvalidTransition: This status change is not allowed from the report's current state.

admin.reviewsSubtitle: Moderate user-submitted reviews. Hide inappropriate content or delete it permanently.
admin.noReviewsFound: No reviews match the current filters.
admin.author: Author
admin.subject: Subject
admin.hideReviewWarning: Hidden reviews are kept on file but stop counting toward the subject's rating and aren't visible in the public profile.
admin.removeReviewWarning: Removed reviews are treated as deleted: invisible everywhere and excluded from rating aggregates. Use this for clear policy violations.
admin.deleteReviewWarning: This action cannot be undone. The review will be removed from the database and the user's rating average will be recalculated.
admin.noRidesFound: No rides match the current filters.
admin.cancelRideWarning: This will immediately cancel the ride and all active passenger bookings. The intervention will be logged in the ride's status history.

reportDescriptions.rudeDriver: Driver was rude and used offensive language during the ride.
reportDescriptions.driverNoShow: The driver never arrived at the pickup location and didn't respond to messages.
reportDescriptions.overcharging: Driver charged more than the agreed price without explanation.
reportDescriptions.leftLuggage: Passenger forgot a bag in the car and the driver refused to return it.
reportDescriptions.passengerNoShow: Passenger booked a seat but never appeared and didn't cancel in advance.
